since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.35%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.16% · BTC -3.09% · Gold -2.67% · Nasdaq100 +2.43%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.35%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.35%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.05%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.05%, SMR +11.38%, INTC +10.57%, SMCI +9.92%, LSCC +9.04%. Laggards: INOD -7.64%, SPCX -7.37%, IBM -4.55%, WDAY -2.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.37% at $177.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
